'''Ururur''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> who lived on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Databank" /> during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="timeline">The [[Masters of the Force (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Masters of the Force'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].</ref> Ururur was the leader of a Tusken [[Ururur's tribe|tribe]]. Ururur wore desert-[[Color/Legends|colored]] robes with two [[Bandolier/Legends|bandoliers]] strapped diagonally across both sides of the chest above another worn as a [[Belt/Legends|belt]], the standard Tusken mask, and wielded a [[Gaderffii/Legends|Gaderffii]]. As a tribe leader, Ururur made harsh laws with severe penalties as it was the only way to maintain control.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ururur was first mentioned on a card in the [[2001]] [[Masters of the Force (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Masters of the Force'']] expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
